factors.data_availability: medium — serum and urine are available but synovial tissue biopsy is invasive and collected at fewer sites
factors.org_discoverability: medium — BIOMEDICA CRO and NDRI are findable; Stibion is a niche Dutch autoimmune specialist with lower PubMed presence
factors.biomarker_specificity: high — RF, anti-CCP, and medication history not tracked in any biospecimen registry

expected_failure_modes: Synovial tissue biopsy requires ultrasound guidance and is performed at specialist rheumatology centers, not routine commercial biobanking — only 27 tissue specimens in AminoChain

Treatment-naive RA patients are primarily enrolled in clinical trials (TACERA, SERA, PRAIRIE), not biobanks — pipeline may find these but specimen re-access is not equivalent to commercial procurement
RF and anti-CCP documentation varies across centers and is not tracked in biospecimen registries — pipeline must not hallucinate documented status
AminoChain has only 13 synovial fluid specimens across 3 orgs — N >= 30 synovial specimens is unlikely without multi-org aggregation and direct inquiry
